name: Dump Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Pour the cherry pie filling into a greased 9x13 inch baking pan.
3. Sprinkle the grated coconut evenly over the pie filling.
4. Mix in the yellow cake mix and chopped nuts until combined.
5. Spread the mixture uniformly across the pie filling.
6. Drizzle the melted butter or margarine over the top of the cake batter.
7. Bake for approximately 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
9. Serve with vanilla ice cream, if desired.
Posted by Joann Pierce
